best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-access-001 title: user logs in successfully for the first time module: access source pages: 1 preconditions: user has never accessed the app before. test data: valid username and password. test steps: 1. user opens the app. 2. user is prompted to enter credentials. 3. user enters valid username and password. 4. application sends credentials to the server. 5. server verifies credentials against the database. 6. server confirms valid credentials. 7. application compares entered credentials with those in the database. 8. application informs the user that the login was successful. expected result: user is redirected to the home page.

test case id: tc-statistics-001 title: user views weekly report module: statistics source pages: 3 preconditions: user is logged in and on the statistiche page. test data: no specific data required. test steps: 1. user is on the statistiche page. 2. user selects to view the weekly report. 3. application prompts the user to confirm the report. 4. user confirms the report. 5. application retrieves the weekly report from the server. 6. application displays the weekly report to the user. expected result: user sees the weekly report on the report settimanale page.
